subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Today hath the irrevocable Cause been made manifest from the presence of the Lord of nations and the Adorner of the world. Verily, He guideth all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد الیوم ظهر الامر المبرم من لدن مالک الامم و مزین العالم انه یهدی الکل
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
